results.title: EU agrees to launch membership talks with Ukraine next week even as war with Russia drags on
results.description: The European Union has agreed to start membership talks with Ukraine next week after ambassadors decided that a conference to officially launch negotiations with Ukraine and Moldova will be held in Luxembourg on Monday.

results.title: Trump to participate in G7 working session with Zelensky
results.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump will take part in a G7 working session with Ukraine's Volodymyr Zelensky in France on Tuesday, a senior administration official said.

results.title: Israeli settlers shoot, injure disabled Palestinian man in WB
results.description: The head of the Palestinian village of Duma confirmed that the man suffered from a mental disability and was held by Israeli forces after being shot.

results.title: Iranian ambassador at World Cup: ‘Iran and the U.S. can be very good friends’
results.description: Tehran's top diplomat in Mexico says Iran's presence in the United States for the World Cup should be read as a gesture of goodwill amid talks to end the conflict.

results.title: ‘Release Nnamdi Kanu Or Detain Sheikh Gumi’ — Primate Ayodele Tells Federal Gov’t
results.description: The Leader of INRI Evangelical Spiritual Church, Primate Elijah Ayodele, has questioned the continuous detention of the leader of the proscribed Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB), Nnamdi Kanu, while Islamic cleric, Sheikh Ahmad Gumi, was free. Ayodele urged the Federal Government to release the detained leader of IPOB, arguing that fairness should guide the government’s [...]

results.title: A Judge Calls It Censorship and Orders Trump’s Officials to Restore What They Stripped From the National Parks
results.description: A federal judge has ordered Donald Trump's administration to restore the signs and exhibits about slavery, climate change and Native Americans it stripped from national parks under an order targeting material that cast the country in a negative light. Calling the purge censorship, the judge gave officials three weeks to put the history back.
